mission.title: harbor: Performance Improvement Proposal for queries related with the Task Table
mission.description: Performance Improvement Proposal for queries related with the Task Table. This issue affects 9+ users.

steps.title: Identify harbor troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your harbor deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=harbor
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors related to: Performance Improvement Proposal for queries related with the Task Table

steps.title: Check current resource configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant harbor resources:
```bash
kubectl get resource -A
kubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>
```
****Is** your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
When you have the Trivy scanner activated and want to perform one of the following operations:

- List the artifacts of a project

# Issue being fixed
Fixes #(issue)

Please indicate you've done the following:
```yaml
when you run a query like just below the result of the EXPLAIN command indicates a seq_scan. It meens there's no use of the index  "idx_task_extra_attrs_report_uuids"  defined with task table.
```

steps.title: Confirm Performance Improvement Proposal for queries relat is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
The root cause is: …trs_report_uuids

Thank you for contributing to Harbor!

# Comprehensive Summary of your change

# Issue being fixed
Fixes #(issue)

Please indicate you've done the following:. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.
codeSnippets: when you run a query like just below the result of the EXPLAIN command indicates a seq_scan. It meens there's no use of the index  "idx_task_extra_attrs_report_uuids"  defined with task table.

You might think the index will be used but it's not the case it's still a seq_scan.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with harbor installed or the issue environment reproducible.
